summary: Complete Archer home page with 10 sections tested successfully. All sections verified: Hero (128px title with sparkle badge animation), Trust Bar (5 items), Pillars (3 cards with animated arrows, Execution has GREEN icon), Intelligence (4 stats + 6 capabilities), Attorney Letter (split layout with DELIVERED badge), Live Counsel (Sarah Mitchell avatar), VS Old World (6-row comparison table with Archer column highlighted blue), Pricing Teaser (3 plans - Solo $29.99, Family $49.99 featured, Pro $89.99), FAQ (8 questions in 2-column grid), Final CTA (full-bleed blue background with Upload button). Both EN and FR versions work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.js uses internal C.en/C.fr content object for bilingual support - well structured
All CSS animations working: badge-glow (hero badge), sparkle-twinkle (sparkle icons), pulse-anim (Live dot), draw-line/fade-in (pillar arrows)
Responsive breakpoints at 1100px and 640px properly implemented
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Execution pillar correctly has GREEN icon (#15803d stroke, #dcfce7 background)
test_credentials: N/A - Landing page is public, no auth required
seed_data_creation: None - Landing page uses static content
